example.quote: eka eva suhṛd dharmo nidhane 'py anuyāti yaḥ

senses.loss: The paryāya synonym run and its authority (ity amaraḥ) are a single iti-unit in the source: sense enumeration and source attestation are one construction, not separable into def + bibl.

senses.def: law; nature; custom; likeness; sacrifice; non-violence; an Upaniṣad

loss: Indigenous kosa entry: senses are provided explicitly (curated) because the iti-unit/paryāya structure of Sanskrit-to-Sanskrit lexica is not yet parsed by the pilot's MW-tuned extractor. A kosa sense-boundary parser is slice 3.
